ipAddress.description: Client IP address (auto-detected if not provided)

userAgent.description: Client user agent (auto-detected if not provided)

force.description: Force sync even if recently synced

userId.description: The ID of the user to block

exportedAt.description: Timestamp when the export was generated

data.description: Raw import data (format depends on source)

count.description: Number of messages marked as read

stepData.description: Data to save for the current step

noData.description: User has no data for this section

content.description: Item content - structure depends on section type

steps.description: All onboarding steps with field defs

items.description: Section items as generic content objects

data.description: Generic section data. Structure is defined by sectionTypeKey and SectionType metadata.

force.description: Optional flag to force retry even if not failed

stepData.description: Data to save for the current step

recipientId.description: The ID of the user to send the message to

isAdmin.description: Whether user is admin (calculated from role)

isApprover.description: Whether user is approver (calculated from role)

needsOnboarding.description: Whether user needs to complete onboarding

required.description: Whether this step must be completed

component.description: Component type hint for frontend rendering

fields.description: Field definitions for form rendering (section steps)

addLabel.description: Label for the add-item button (section steps)

fullSync.description: Force full sync instead of incremental

file.description: The company logo file to upload (JPEG, PNG, WebP, SVG)
The profile image file to upload (JPEG, PNG, WebP)

code.description: Error code identifying the validation failure

resumeId.description: Optional resume ID for semantic snapshot lookup

valid.description: Whether the username passes all format validations

available.description: Whether the username is available (not taken by another user)

errors.description: List of validation errors (empty if valid)
